name: HOLIDAY INN EXPRESS HOTEL AND SUITES

violations.description: Person in charge. — --Certified food service manager had an expired certificate or is no longer associated with this establishment. Certified food manager left facility about 8 months ago and has not been replaced. Facility must have a certified food manager in place as soon as possible.

Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not stored in a clean, dry manner to protect from contamination. Container with utensils under the oven was found with debris. Utensils should be stored in a clean location.
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Properly designed, located, constructed, operated, maintained, cleaned and chemical test kit provided (2 pts deducted)
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
